positive: A minimalist geometric illustration of a majestic mountain range silhouette against a vibrant, gradient sunset sky. The composition is centered, featuring stylized, interconnected geometric peaks that vary in height. Use deep sapphire blues, burnt orange, and dusty rose pinks for the color palette. The design must be isolated and scalable, with crisp, solid lines and clean negative space, suitable for screen printing on t-shirts. Mid-century modern aesthetic, vector art style, high contrast, perfect symmetry, highly detailed, clean edges.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, sloppy lines, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, graffiti, photorealism, low resolution
